info.name: text-insert
info.text: The more theories you have, the more complex your network of theories becomes.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: The more theories you have, the more complex your network of theories becomes as each one builds on the other.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: It will take a lot of hard work and study to build a hypothetically perfect theory.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: It will take a lot of hard work and study to build a hypothetically perfect theory.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: You can't build a tower without a foundation.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You can't build a theory without a foundation.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: The more you know, the taller the theory is.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: A theory is complicated as you add several layers of truth.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: What kind of theories can you build if you don't have a foundation?

info.name: text-delete
info.text: What kind of theories can you build if you don't have a foundation?

info.name: text-insert
info.text: If we don't build them, someone will.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: If we don't build the theories, someone will.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: Make sure you're building something good.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Make sure you're building something good when you are stacking up your theories.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: Theories are the foundation of our knowledge.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Theories are the foundation of our knowledge.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: You can't build a theory without tests.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You can't build a theory without tests, much like a building needs tests to test it's structure.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: We can't just demolish these theories overnight, they need time to calm down and be rebuilt.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: We can't just demolish these theories overnight, they need time to calm down and be rebuilt.
